channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: What to watch this Memorial Day weekend
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss highlights new movies and shows to enjoy over the holiday weekend.

item.title: How much emergency savings should you keep while paying off debt
item.description: Balancing an emergency fund with debt repayment can be challenging. Here's how to find the right approach.

item.title: NASCAR great Kyle Busch was coughing up blood day before he died, 911 call says
item.description: A 911 caller reported that an individual at a Charlotte technical center was experiencing shortness of breath.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigning as intel chief, citing husband's cancer diagnosis
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard steps down as director of national intelligence after her husband was diagnosed with a rare bone cancer.
